conformanceNote: Dashboard owns the grid family kernel (DashboardDesigner + DesignerCanvas + grid layout store); WidgetRenderer goes through SharedChartFactory and local chart components are @deprecated. Single grid surface so the kernel is not yet extracted to a standalone SDK (DDR non-goal until a 2nd grid surface appears).
note: Grid family reference implementation. Page may consume-only embed a dashboard via a dashboardEmbed block (B4) without owning dashboard DSL.
